transitions.note: v2 refactor initialized. v1 is 2,135 lines. Quick audit: 2 P0, 5 P1, 3 P2. Third per-screen alignment (after Home v2 PR #61, Onboarding v2 PR #59).

Phase 0 approved. 32 findings (8 P0, 16 P1, 8 P2). Key decisions: flexible activity switching (no day-locked types), rest timer redesign, collapsed finished exercises, skeleton loading, full AX5, per-exercise analytics. Rest day UX + AI recommendations deferred to own PM cycles.

decisions.Q1_decomposition: Main container with flexible activity switching — day types NOT locked to specific days. Max flexibility.
decisions.Q3_completed_exercises: Collapsed by default once marked finished
decisions.Q5_rest_day: Keep as-is for now — spun off as own feature with full PM cycle
decisions.Q7_analytics: Per-exercise granularity (weekly/30d/90d). Future: meta-analysis per session + AI engine recommendations (separate feature)

deferred_features: Rest day positive experience redesign (own PM cycle)
Advanced data fusion + AI engine exercise recommendations (own PM cycle)
